hero.headline: Know What's Coming Before It Cries
hero.subheadline: BabyCoach tracks every sleep, feed, and diaper — then predicts your baby's next move, so you can finally rest easy.

features.title: Everything you need, nothing you don't
features.subtitle: From quick manual logging to AI-powered predictions — all in one calm, focused app.

logging.title: Smart Logging
logging.description: Log sleep, feeds, and diapers in seconds. No friction, just clean data that builds a picture of your baby's day — automatically.

predictions.title: Nap Predictions
predictions.description: The SweetSpot algorithm learns your baby's unique rhythms and predicts the next nap window before the fussiness even starts.

insights.title: AI Insights
insights.description: Chat with your personal AI baby coach for advice tailored to your baby's specific patterns, history, and developmental stage.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you're ready.

basic.name: Basic
basic.description: Perfect for getting started. Manual tracking with history and charts.

smart.name: Smart
smart.description: AI-powered suggestions that reduce the mental load of guessing.

agent.name: Agent
agent.description: Your personal AI coach, always available to talk through what's happening.

footer.headline: Ready to stop guessing?
footer.subheadline: Join thousands of parents who sleep a little better thanks to BabyCoach.

aiAssistant.title: Baby Assistent
aiAssistant.topicSubtitle: Select a question or type your own

sleep.label: Sleep suggestion
sleep.question: When should my baby sleep next?
sleep.prompt: Based on my baby's recent sleep tracking data, when should they sleep next and for how long?

feeding.label: Feeding check
feeding.question: How is feeding going today?
feeding.prompt: Based on my baby's recent feeding data, how is feeding going and when should the next feeding be?

sleep.label: Sleep
questions: Is my baby's sleep normal for their age?
How long should naps be?
What is a good bedtime routine?
Dream feeding – tips & tricks
Why does my baby wake up at night?
When will my baby sleep through the night?

feeding.label: Feeding
questions: How often should I feed my baby?
Is my baby getting enough milk?
When to introduce solid foods?

How to handle a nursing strike?

diapers.label: Diapers
questions: How many wet diapers per day is normal?

development.label: Development
questions: What milestones should I expect at this age?

When do babies start talking?
How to support cognitive development?

routines.label: Routines
questions: How to build a daily routine?
